items.prompt: In the starter map, dut dot signal on the cocotb side corresponds to…
items.explain: Both sides need a handle into the DUT — Python dut vs SV vif.

items.prompt: await RisingEdge in cocotb plays a similar role to @posedge in SV testbench code.
items.explain: Both advance or synchronize to simulation time events.

items.prompt: Plain cocotb pin assigns map most closely to which UVM role?
items.explain: Direct assigns are the driver job before you hide them in an agent.

items.prompt: pyuvm agent on the Python side maps to…
items.explain: pyuvm mirrors the SV agent box — same roles, Python classes.

items.prompt: This lab teaches exact one-line API equivalence between cocotb and UVM.
items.explain: Role literacy — same jobs, different language and packaging.
